description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Event Details

Date: Saturday, June 27, 2026

Gathering time: 10:00 a.m.

Gathering place: West parking lot of Hanno City Hall

Route: City Hall → Nakai → mountain path beside Musashi Golf Club → Tourist Information Office (closed) → beside Musashidai water distribution facility → Yokotedai → beside Manfukuji Temple → Azuma Gorge → Hanno Riverbed → City Hall

Distance: Approximately 13 kilometers

Estimated duration: Approximately 4 hours

Fee: 200 yen (covers insurance, collected on the day)

What to bring: Packed lunch, drinks, rain gear, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one)

Registration: Apply to ASA Hanno by Tuesday, June 23, 2026
Phone: 042-972-4701
Fax: 042-974-2190

Weather cancellation check: If the event is cancelled due to weather or other reasons, confirm after 9:00 a.m. on the day by contacting ASA Hanno.

Inquiries: Onda 090-2205-8073

Organized by: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/9290.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Event: June 27, 2026 (Saturday) – Walk from Musashidai and Yokotedai to Azuma Gorge
